message:
style(model): use .into() for Arc<AssistantMessage> conversions in tests

Replace explicit Arc::new() calls with .into() when constructing
AssistantMessageEvent partial/message fields in unit tests, leveraging
the From<AssistantMessage> impl for Arc<AssistantMessage>. This is
purely cosmetic — reduces visual noise in test code without changing
any behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
